headlines.description: Struggling Holstein Kiel scored three times in a dominant first half but had to survive a late comeback from Borussia Dortmund before beating the visitors 4-2 on Tuesday, a second straight Bundesliga loss for the Ruhr valley club.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund slump to 4-2 loss despite late comeback

video.headline: Holstein Kiel vs. Borussia Dortmund - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Holstein Kiel vs. Borussia Dortmund - Game Highlights) 2025/01/14 ESHEET

headlines.description: Champions Bayer Leverkusen battled past Mainz 05 with a 1-0 win coming courtesy of a superb Alex Grimaldo free kick on Tuesday to stretch their winning run to seven straight matches in the Bundesliga and close in on leaders Bayern Munich.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen close on Bayern with 7th win in a row

video.headline: Leverkusen takes 1-0 lead on Alejandro Grimaldo's spectacular free kick

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Leverkusen takes 1-0 lead on Alejandro Grimaldo’s spectacular free kick) 2025/01/14 ESHEET
